questions.question: Define the terms 'plain function' and 'one-to-one function' and provide an example of each.
questions.hint: Clearly explain the definitions and provide a suitable example for each.

questions.question: If f(x) = x^2 and g(x) = 2x, determine whether the functions f and g are one-to-one. Provide a reason for your answer.
questions.hint: Explain the concept of one-to-one functions and how it applies to the given functions.

questions.question: State the key difference between a plain function and a one-to-one function, using a specific example to illustrate your answer.
questions.hint: Clearly explain the distinction and provide a suitable example.
